title: IBM TechXchange Pre-Conference watsonx Hackathon
description: External registration required! Hack your way to the IBM TechXchange Conference! Join this virtual watsonx Hackathon where you’ll get access to watsonx featuring IBM Granite and could win a trip to Las Vegas. Check the website to [learn more](https://www.ibm.com/community/ibm-techxchange-conference-hackathon/) and to [RSVP](https://pretxchack.watsonx-challenge.ibm.com/welcome)!
